channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 5.3%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Angela Rayner says Starmer should ‘reflect on’ stepping aside after HMRC clears her over tax affairs - UK politics live
item.description: Angela Rayner says Starmer should ‘reflect on’ stepping aside after HMRC clears her over tax affairs - UK politics live

item.title: LabourList: Streeting would lose leadership contest against Keir Starmer, poll reveals
item.description: Streeting would lose leadership contest against Keir Starmer, poll reveals

item.title: Independent UK Politics: The Latest: Prime Minister Keir Starmer's future remains uncertain
item.description: The Latest: Prime Minister Keir Starmer's future remains uncertain

item.title: Independent UK Politics: More Mandelson files ‘set to be released next week’ in yet another blow to Starmer
item.description: More Mandelson files ‘set to be released next week’ in yet another blow to Starmer

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Leadership rules should ‘not be tweaked’ to let Burnham run for PM, Labour NEC member says
item.description: Leadership rules should ‘not be tweaked’ to let Burnham run for PM, Labour NEC member says

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer latest: Reeves warns leadership challenge risks ‘chaos’ as Rayner cleared over tax affairs
item.description: Starmer latest: Reeves warns leadership challenge risks ‘chaos’ as Rayner cleared over tax affairs

item.title: FT UK Politics: Streeting delays challenge as allies claim PM under new pressure to quit
item.description: Streeting delays challenge as allies claim PM under new pressure to quit

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Why the path to No 10 is not an easy one for any of Starmer’s would-be challengers
item.description: Why the path to No 10 is not an easy one for any of Starmer’s would-be challengers

item.title: BBC Politics: At a glance: Starmer fights to stay on as prime minister
item.description: At a glance: Starmer fights to stay on as prime minister

item.title: BBC Politics: Angela Rayner settles tax bill with HMRC
item.description: Angela Rayner settles tax bill with HMRC
